---
title: "MSA_rockfish"
format: html
author: "Eric Witte"
date: "2025-09-15"
editor: visual
---

  

# ------------------------------
# Build phylogeny with msa plot and highlight residues
# ------------------------------

library(ggtree)
library(treeio)
library(ggmsa)       # for msaplot + residue extraction
library(ggplot2)
library(ape)
library(Biostrings)
library(grid)


# --- Inputs
TREE_FILE <- "sebastes_tox_526.fasta.treefile"

seq_file <- "sebastes_tox_526.csv"

residues_to_extract <- c(46, 54, 62, 133, 136, 140, 141, 144, 149, 162, 226, 239, 257, 301, 332, 377, 383, 426, 502, 539, 207, 235, 268, 351, 510, 520, 546, 573, 64, 66, 68, 228, 230, 232)  # <-- sites of interest

constraint <- c('Sebastes_umbrosus_4', 'Sebastes_umbrosus_3', 'Pterois_miles_3', 'Pterois_miles_2', 'Pterois_miles_1', 'Synanceia_verrucosa_6', 'Synanceia_verrucosa_4', 'Synanceia_verrucosa_3', 'Hypodytes_rubripinnis_4', 'Hypodytes_rubripinnis_2', 'Siniperca_chuatsi_6', 'Siniperca_chuatsi_4', 'Enoplosus_armatus_3', 'Scatophagus_argus_3', 'Chaetodon_trifascialis_1', 'Holacanthus_passer_1', 'Centropyge_bicolor_1', 'Zanclus_cornutus_1', 'Naso_brevirostris_1', 'Siganus_fuscescens_3', 'Siganus_canaliculatus_2', 'Sebastes_umbrosus_6', 'Sebastes_umbrosus_7', 'Sebastes_umbrosus_5', 'Pterois_miles_5', 'Pterois_miles_6', 'Pterois_miles_4', 'Synanceia_verrucosa_5', 'Synanceia_verrucosa_2', 'Synanceia_verrucosa_1', 'Hypodytes_rubripinnis_3', 'Hypodytes_rubripinnis_1', 'Siniperca_chuatsi_5', 'Siniperca_chuatsi_3', 'Enoplosus_armatus_2', 'Chaetodon_trifascialis_2', 'Holacanthus_passer_2', 'Centropyge_bicolor_2', 'Zanclus_cornutus_2', 'Acanthurus_lineatus_1', 'Scatophagus_argus_4', 'Siganus_fuscescens_2', 'Siganus_fuscescens_1', 'Siganus_canaliculatus_1')


# --- Load tree
tree_msa <- ape::read.tree(TREE_FILE)

# --- Build ggtree object (rotated tree, not ladderized)

tree_250 <- ape::root(tree_msa, node = 250)

tree_order <- ape::rotateConstr(tree_250, constraint = constraint)

p <- ggtree(tree_order, ladderize = FALSE)

highlight_nodes   <- c(196, 218)       # nodes to highlight
highlight_labels  <- c("Clade 2", "Clade 3")  # labels to show (these will be placed top-left of box)
highlight_fill    <- c("#66FF66", "#FFFF66")  # yellow, green (vivid)

p1 <- p +
  geom_hilight(node = highlight_nodes[1], fill = highlight_fill[1], alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_hilight(node = highlight_nodes[2], fill = highlight_fill[2], alpha = 0.3) +
  theme_tree2() +
  theme(
    axis.line.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    axis.text.x = element_blank()
  )

# --- Load aa seqs

ven_dat<- read.csv(file = "data/8925_nuc1.translated.csv", sep = ",")

head(ven_dat)

ven_dat<- as.matrix(ven_dat)
dim(ven_dat)

ven_dat_df <- as.data.frame(ven_dat)

res <- extract_residue_matrix(data = ven_dat_df, positions = residues_to_extract)

dim(res)

# Get order based on numeric suffix
num_order <- order(as.numeric(sub("Pos", "", colnames(res))))

# Reorder dataframe columns
res_sorted <- res[, num_order]

# Check
colnames(res_sorted)

#Write FASTA
res_seqs <- apply(res_sorted, 1, paste0, collapse = "")

# Convert to AAStringSet (or DNAStringSet)
res_fasta <- AAStringSet(res_seqs)
names(res_fasta) <- rownames(res_sorted)

# Write FASTA file
writeXStringSet(res_fasta, filepath = "data/fixed_res_alignment.fasta")

# --- Run msa plot with sliding window (optional)
# here window just anchors the plot, you can adjust
msa_plot <- msaplot(
  p = p1,
  fasta = "data/fixed_res_alignment.fasta"
)


aln <- readAAStringSet("data/fixed_res_alignment.fasta")
aln_mat <- as.matrix(aln)   # rows = sequences, cols = positions (1–34)

add_gaps <- function(mat, gaps) {
  # gaps is a list of positions after which to insert a gap column
  for (g in sort(gaps, decreasing = TRUE)) {
    empty_col <- rep("-", nrow(mat))  # use "-" or NA for gaps
    mat <- cbind(mat[, 1:g, drop = FALSE], empty_col, mat[, (g+1):ncol(mat), drop = FALSE])
  }
  mat
}

# Insert gaps AFTER col 6 and AFTER col 18
aln_mat_gapped <- add_gaps(aln_mat, c(3, 6, 15, 18))

gapped_seqs <- apply(aln_mat_gapped, 1, paste0, collapse = "")

# Convert to AAStringSet (or DNAStringSet)
gapped_fasta <- AAStringSet(gapped_seqs)
names(gapped_fasta) <- rownames(aln_mat_gapped)

# Write FASTA file
writeXStringSet(gapped_fasta, filepath = "data/add_gaps_alignment.fasta")


msa_plot_gapped <- msaplot(
  p = p1,
  fasta = "data/add_gaps_alignment.fasta"
)





library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)

# Convert your matrix to a dataframe
res_df <- as.data.frame(res, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

# Vector of sites to summarize
sites <- c("Pos64", "Pos66", "Pos68", "Pos228", "Pos230", "Pos232")

summary_res <- res_df %>%
  select(all_of(sites)) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Site", values_to = "Value") %>%
  count(Site, Value) %>%
  group_by(Site) %>%
  mutate(Percent = 100 * n / sum(n)) %>%
  arrange(Site, desc(n)) %>%
  ungroup()

print(summary_res)
